hooks.command:
printf '=== coordination/STATUS.md ===
'; tail -n 5 coordination/STATUS.md 2>/dev/null; printf '
=== coordination/HANDOFF.md (recent) ===
'; tail -n 30 coordination/HANDOFF.md 2>/dev/null

if grep -qi 'CONFLICT' <(tail -n 3 coordination/STATUS.md 2>/dev/null); then printf '\u26a0\ufe0f coordination/STATUS.md shows a CONFLICT \u2014 resolve before changing code:\n'; tail -n 3 coordination/STATUS.md; fi
printf 'Coordination reminder: if you changed code, append a coordination/HANDOFF.md entry and update coordination/PARITY.md (Mac changes \u2192 flip Windows cells to needs-port).\n'
